_comment: Configuration-driven Dosha detection rules. Text preserved exactly from the original hardcoded engine to guarantee backward compatibility.

rules.name: Mangal Dosha
rules.detailTemplate: Mars is placed in house {Mars_house}, a position traditionally associated with Mangal (Manglik) Dosha.

rules.name: Kaal Sarp Dosha
rules.detailTemplate: All major planets fall between the Rahu–Ketu axis, a configuration traditionally associated with Kaal Sarp Dosha.
